code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(cur)
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    nums = list.push(nums, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

let count = nums.len()
mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut cur_max = 0
mut j = 0
while j < count
  let v = match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    cur_max = v
  else
    if v > cur_max
      cur_max = v
    end
  end
  maxes = list.push(maxes, cur_max)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < count
  let v = match maxes.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
